name: Uninsured employer after my injury in Midvale, options?

mainEntity.name: Uninsured employer after my injury in Midvale, options?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**File with Utah Uninsured Employer Fund; employer personally liable.**[5]

State fund covers valid claims against non-compliant bosses.

- Prove insurance lapse.
- Same benefits apply.
- Sue employer directly too.

Labor Commission guides filing. Lawyer pursues both.
